description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-python-release that runs on push and pull request events with a concurrency policy to cancel in-progress jobs for non-master and non-release branches. The workflow consists of two jobs: build-compiler and build-native. The build-compiler job uses a matrix to build .NET 7.0 on multiple platforms (x86_64-macos, x86_64-linux, x86_64-windows), caches NuGet packages, and uploads the build artifact. The build-native job depends on build-compiler, uses another matrix to build on the same platforms, installs the build artifact, sets up .NET and Python, and uploads the Python build artifact.
